---
title: "Enhancing graphics"
date: "2026-10-26"
date_end: "2026-10-30"
---

There's no lesson for this session. In your exercise this week you'll export a plot from ggplot, open it in a [vector editing program](../resource/graphics-editors.qmd), and make it extra pretty and well-designed. The best way to learn this is by actually doing it.

So head over to [the example](../example/10-example.qmd) to see how it's done, or [the exercise](../assignment/10-exercise.qmd) to get started!
